name: live-visitor-geo-pulse-ecwid
description: Static admin-only Ecwid dashboard for Live Visitor Geo Pulse with no database, backend server, or Redis.

scripts.prepare:publish: npm run lint && npm run test:all && npm run build && npm run export:assets && npm run capture:marketplace
scripts.lint: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/dashboard-metrics.js && node --check tests/dashboard-metrics.test.js && node --check tests/e2e/dashboard.spec.js && node --check scripts/export-assets.mjs && node --check scripts/capture-marketplace-screenshots.mjs && node --check playwright.config.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e

author: Dev Lin Duldulao
